title: Staff Engineer, Offensive Security
score_reason: Good match: Offensive security role with penetration testing focus. However, requires 7-10 years experience (candidate has 4 years). Strong alignment with red team operations, vulnerability exploitation, and AppSec skills. Remote position matches preference but seniority level may be too high.

title: Solution Consultant
score_reason: Moderate match: Cybersecurity company (Trellix) with Android reverse engineering focus. Relates to security analysis but is more consultative/sales-oriented rather than hands-on penetration testing. Good benefits package and remote work aligns with preferences.
